title: University of Minnesota
text: Home * Organizations * University of Minnesota University of Minnesota Twin Cities East Bank Campus [1] University of Minnesota Twin Cities , (UM-TC, U of M, UMN) a public research university in Minneapolis and Saint Paul , the Twin Cities , Minnesota the United States .
